= pow


Returns the number raised to the specified exponent.


== Parameters

[cols="1,1,3"]
|===
| Name | Type | Description

| `exponent`
| `float`
| The exponent you want to raise to the power of.

|===


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.new_value = this.value * 10.pow(-2)

# In:  {"value":2}
# Out: {"new_value":0.02}
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.new_value = this.value.pow(-2)

# In:  {"value":2}
# Out: {"new_value":0.25}
----
